# Risk Report

## Risk Description

Describe the risk clearly and concisely.

## Category

Strategic | Delivery | Operational | Compliance | Security | Financial | Reputational

## Trigger

What event would indicate this risk is materializing?

## Assessment

- Impact (1-5):
- Likelihood (1-5):
- Score:

## Mitigation Plan

Describe controls to reduce risk.

## Contingency Plan

Describe fallback actions if risk occurs.

## Owner

Assign a risk owner.
